title: SNAP-Ed BigMap 25
author: Paulina Vergara Buitragp
description: The SNAP-Ed BigMap is an interactive, ArcGIS-based mapping tool used primarily in Minnesota to visualize and analyze SNAP-Ed program locations, eligibility data, and community health indicators. It helps educators and partners identify areas for nutritional programming, such as mapping food access, free/reduced lunch rates, and social determinants of health.
